place: Choeng Mon, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Boutique Three-Bedroom Pool Villa Collection - Choeng Mon
blurb: A boutique collection of just four modern-tropical pool villas on Koh Samui’s serene north-east coast at Choeng Mon, a three-minute drive from the beach. Each single-family villa offers three ensuite bedrooms across 360 m² of open-plan living, with a private pool, warm timber and natural-stone finishes, set on a quiet dead-end street for privacy. Offered freehold or leasehold, from ฿19,100,000.
detail:
A boutique development of only four luxury villas tucked into the calm north-east of Koh Samui at Choeng Mon — one of the island’s most sought-after residential pockets, just one kilometre (about three minutes) from the soft sand of Choeng Mon Beach and a short drive from Big Buddha, Fisherman’s Village and the airport.

Each villa is a 360 m² single-family home of restrained, modern-tropical design — crisp white volumes softened by warm timber ceilings, natural stone and full-height glass that opens the double-height living space to the garden and pool. Three generous bedrooms each have their own ensuite bathroom and walk-in closet, arranged around an open-plan living, dining and kitchen area made for indoor-outdoor living.

The project is designed for privacy and ease: the villas face away from one another on a quiet dead-end street, all the surrounding land is already developed (so no new construction will rise alongside), and each home has its own deep well and a dedicated electrical transformer. With limited maintenance and a low communal fee, it suits a retirement home, a holiday base or a rental investment equally well.

The four villas sit on plots of 460–508 m² and are priced from ฿19,100,000, on equal freehold or 30-year leasehold terms. Two of the four remain available — one ready and one still under construction — while the other two are reserved. Ownership carries only a low communal fee of ฿25,000 a year and a one-time sinking fund of ฿400 per m², with lease renewal available. Optional furniture packages start from ฿1,000,000 and kitchen packages from ฿500,000.

features.l: 1 km / 3 min to Choeng Mon Beach
Freehold or leasehold · 6 km to airport
